---
title: "3. Synthetic Control Analysis"
subtitle: "MY498: Capstone Project 2025-26"
author: "68508"
date: today
format:
    html:
        embed-resources: true
        toc: true
        number-sections: true
        fontsize: 12pt
---
```{r}
#| label: setup
#| message: false

library(tidyverse)
library(zoo)
library(sf)
library(here)
library(tidysynth)
library(patchwork)
library(kableExtra)

Proc <- here("data", "processed")
raw  <- here("data", "raw")

analysis_panel <- readRDS(file.path(Proc, "analysis_panel.rds"))
study_sf       <- readRDS(file.path(Proc, "study_sf.rds"))

study_sf <- study_sf |>
    mutate(london = as.integer(str_starts(ons_code, "E09")))

message("Panel loaded: ", nrow(analysis_panel), " rows | ",
        n_distinct(analysis_panel$ons_code), " study units")
```

```{r}
#| label: setup-2019
#| message: false

# 2019 expansion
# Treated: boroughs inside the 2019 CCZ zone (rv_2019 < 0, london == 1)
# Donor pool: outer London boroughs + surrounding districts

panel_synth <- analysis_panel |>
    st_drop_geometry() |>
    mutate(time_num = year + (quarter - 1) / 4)

treated_2019 <- panel_synth |>
    filter(london == 1, rv_2019 < 0) |>
    distinct(ons_code, la_name) |>
    pull(la_name)

donor_2019 <- panel_synth |>
    filter(rv_2019 > 0 | london == 0) |>
    distinct(ons_code, la_name) |>
    pull(la_name)

message("Treated units (2019): ", length(treated_2019))
message("Donor pool (2019): ", length(donor_2019))
print(treated_2019)
```

```{r}
#| label: synth-2019
#| message: false

# Filter panel to 2019 expansion window
# Announcement: ~2017 Q1, Implementation: 2019 Q2
# Window: 2011 Q4 to 2021 Q3 (before 2021 expansion)
panel_2019 <- panel_synth |>
    filter(yq <= as.yearqtr("2021 Q3")) |>
    filter(la_name %in% c(treated_2019, donor_2019))

# Function to run synthetic control for a single unit
run_synth_2019 <- function(borough) {
    data_filtered <- panel_2019 |>
        filter(la_name %in% donor_2019 | la_name == borough)
    
    tryCatch(
        data_filtered |>
            synthetic_control(
                outcome           = ulev_share,
                unit              = la_name,
                time              = time_num,
                i_unit            = borough,
                i_time            = 2017.0,
                generate_placebos = TRUE
            ) |>
            generate_predictor(
                time_window   = 2014.0:2017.0,
                mean_ulev_pre = mean(ulev_share)
            ) |>
            generate_predictor(
                time_window = 2016.75,
                ulev_pre    = ulev_share
            ) |>
            generate_weights(optimization_window = 2014.0:2017.0) |>
            generate_control(),
        error = function(e) {
            message("Failed for ", borough, ": ", conditionMessage(e))
            NULL
        }
    )
}

synth_2019_list <- map(treated_2019, run_synth_2019)
names(synth_2019_list) <- treated_2019

map_chr(synth_2019_list, ~ if (is.null(.x)) "FAILED" else "OK")
```

```{r}
#| label: sig-2019
#| message: false

sig_2019 <- map_dfr(
    names(synth_2019_list),
    ~ synth_2019_list[[.x]] |>
        grab_significance() |>
        filter(unit_name == .x) |>
        mutate(borough = .x)
)

sig_2019 |>
    select(borough, rank, mspe_ratio, fishers_exact_pvalue) |>
    arrange(rank) |>
    kable(
        digits  = 3,
        caption = "Synthetic Control Results — 2019 ULEZ Expansion",
        col.names = c("Borough", "Rank", "MSPE Ratio", "p-value")
    ) |>
    kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"))
```

```{r}
#| label: plot-2019-all-updated
#| message: false

plots_2019_all <- map2(
    synth_2019_list,
    names(synth_2019_list),
    ~ .x |>
        plot_trends() +
        geom_vline(xintercept = 2017.0,
                   linetype = "dashed", colour = "black", linewidth = 0.6) +
        geom_vline(xintercept = 2019.25,
                   linetype = "dashed", colour = "red", linewidth = 0.6) +
        annotate("text", x = 2017.0, y = Inf,
                 vjust = 1.5, hjust = -0.1, size = 2, colour = "black",
                 label = "Ann.") +
        annotate("text", x = 2019.25, y = Inf,
                 vjust = 1.5, hjust = -0.1, size = 2, colour = "red",
                 label = "Imp.") +
        labs(
            title = .y,
            x     = NULL,
            y     = "ULEV share"
        ) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 8))
)

wrap_plots(plots_2019_all, ncol = 2)
```

```{r}
#| label: plot-tower-hamlets
#| message: false

p_trends <- synth_2019_list[["Tower Hamlets"]] |>
    plot_trends() +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 2017.0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "red") +
    labs(
        title    = "Synthetic Control: Tower Hamlets — 2019 ULEZ Expansion",
        subtitle = "Actual vs synthetic ULEV compliance share",
        x        = "Quarter", y = "ULEV share"
    ) +
    theme_minimal()

p_placebo <- synth_2019_list[["Tower Hamlets"]] |>
    plot_placebos() +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 2017.0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "red") +
    labs(
        title = "Placebo Test: Tower Hamlets — 2019 ULEZ Expansion",
        x     = "Quarter", y = "Gap in ULEV share"
    ) +
    theme_minimal()

p_trends / p_placebo
```

```{r}
#| label: setup-2021
#| message: false

# 2021 expansion
# Treated: boroughs inside 2021 zone but outside 2019 zone
# Donor pool: outer London boroughs + surrounding districts

treated_2021 <- panel_synth |>
    filter(london == 1, rv_2021 < 0, rv_2019 > 0) |>
    distinct(ons_code, la_name) |>
    pull(la_name)

donor_2021 <- panel_synth |>
    filter(rv_2021 > 0 | london == 0) |>
    distinct(ons_code, la_name) |>
    pull(la_name)

message("Treated units (2021): ", length(treated_2021))
message("Donor pool (2021): ", length(donor_2021))
print(treated_2021)
```

```{r}
#| label: synth-2021
#| message: false

# Filter panel to 2021 expansion window
# Announcement: ~2019 Q2, Implementation: 2021 Q4
# Window: 2011 Q4 to 2023 Q2 (before 2023 expansion)
panel_2021 <- panel_synth |>
    filter(yq <= as.yearqtr("2023 Q2")) |>
    filter(la_name %in% c(treated_2021, donor_2021))

run_synth_2021 <- function(borough) {
    data_filtered <- panel_2021 |>
        filter(la_name %in% donor_2021 | la_name == borough)
    
    tryCatch(
        data_filtered |>
            synthetic_control(
                outcome           = ulev_share,
                unit              = la_name,
                time              = time_num,
                i_unit            = borough,
                i_time            = 2019.25,
                generate_placebos = TRUE
            ) |>
            generate_predictor(
                time_window   = 2016.0:2019.25,
                mean_ulev_pre = mean(ulev_share)
            ) |>
            generate_predictor(
                time_window = 2019.0,
                ulev_pre    = ulev_share
            ) |>
            generate_weights(optimization_window = 2016.0:2019.25) |>
            generate_control(),
        error = function(e) {
            message("Failed for ", borough, ": ", conditionMessage(e))
            NULL
        }
    )
}

synth_2021_list <- map(treated_2021, run_synth_2021)
names(synth_2021_list) <- treated_2021

map_chr(synth_2021_list, ~ if (is.null(.x)) "FAILED" else "OK")
```

```{r}
#| label: sig-2021
#| message: false

sig_2021 <- map_dfr(
    names(synth_2021_list),
    ~ synth_2021_list[[.x]] |>
        grab_significance() |>
        filter(unit_name == .x) |>
        mutate(borough = .x)
)

sig_2021 |>
    select(borough, rank, mspe_ratio, fishers_exact_pvalue) |>
    arrange(rank) |>
    kable(
        digits    = 3,
        caption   = "Synthetic Control Results — 2021 ULEZ Expansion",
        col.names = c("Borough", "Rank", "MSPE Ratio", "p-value")
    )
```

```{r}
#| label: plot-2021-all
#| message: false

plots_2021_all <- map2(
    synth_2021_list,
    names(synth_2021_list),
    ~ .x |>
        plot_trends() +
        geom_vline(xintercept = 2019.25,
                   linetype = "dashed", colour = "black", linewidth = 0.6) +
        geom_vline(xintercept = 2021.75,
                   linetype = "dashed", colour = "red", linewidth = 0.6) +
        annotate("text", x = 2019.25, y = Inf,
                 vjust = 1.5, hjust = -0.1, size = 2, colour = "black",
                 label = "Ann.") +
        annotate("text", x = 2021.75, y = Inf,
                 vjust = 1.5, hjust = -0.1, size = 2, colour = "red",
                 label = "Imp.") +
        labs(
            title = .y,
            x     = NULL,
            y     = "ULEV share"
        ) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 8))
)

wrap_plots(plots_2021_all, ncol = 2)
```

```{r}
#| label: setup-2023
#| message: false

# 2023 expansion
# Treated: outer London boroughs (london == 1, treated == 1)
# Donor pool: surrounding districts ONLY (never treated)
# Note: inner London boroughs excluded from donor pool as they
# were already subject to earlier ULEZ expansions

treated_2023 <- panel_synth |>
    filter(london == 1, treated == 1) |>
    distinct(ons_code, la_name) |>
    pull(la_name)

donor_2023 <- panel_synth |>
    filter(london == 0) |>
    distinct(ons_code, la_name) |>
    pull(la_name)

message("Treated units (2023): ", length(treated_2023))
message("Donor pool (2023): ", length(donor_2023))
print(donor_2023)
```

```{r}
#| label: synth-2023
#| message: false

# Filter panel to 2023 expansion window
# Announcement: 2022 Q4, Implementation: 2023 Q3
# Window: 2011 Q4 to 2024 Q4 (full panel)
panel_2023 <- panel_synth |>
    filter(la_name %in% c(treated_2023, donor_2023))

run_synth_2023 <- function(borough) {
    data_filtered <- panel_2023 |>
        filter(la_name %in% donor_2023 | la_name == borough)
    
    tryCatch(
        data_filtered |>
            synthetic_control(
                outcome           = ulev_share,
                unit              = la_name,
                time              = time_num,
                i_unit            = borough,
                i_time            = 2022.75,
                generate_placebos = TRUE
            ) |>
            generate_predictor(
                time_window   = 2019.0:2022.75,
                mean_ulev_pre = mean(ulev_share)
            ) |>
            generate_predictor(
                time_window = 2022.0,
                ulev_pre    = ulev_share
            ) |>
            generate_weights(optimization_window = 2019.0:2022.75) |>
            generate_control(),
        error = function(e) {
            message("Failed for ", borough, ": ", conditionMessage(e))
            NULL
        }
    )
}

synth_2023_list <- map(treated_2023, run_synth_2023)
names(synth_2023_list) <- treated_2023

map_chr(synth_2023_list, ~ if (is.null(.x)) "FAILED" else "OK")
```

```{r}
#| label: sig-2023
#| message: false

sig_2023 <- map_dfr(
    names(synth_2023_list),
    ~ synth_2023_list[[.x]] |>
        grab_significance() |>
        filter(unit_name == .x) |>
        mutate(borough = .x)
)

sig_2023 |>
    select(borough, rank, mspe_ratio, fishers_exact_pvalue) |>
    arrange(rank) |>
    kable(
        digits    = 3,
        caption   = "Synthetic Control Results — 2023 ULEZ Expansion",
        col.names = c("Borough", "Rank", "MSPE Ratio", "p-value")
    )
```

```{r}
#| label: plot-2023-all
#| message: false

plots_2023_all <- map2(
    synth_2023_list,
    names(synth_2023_list),
    ~ .x |>
        plot_trends() +
        geom_vline(xintercept = 2022.75,
                   linetype = "dashed", colour = "black", linewidth = 0.6) +
        geom_vline(xintercept = 2023.5,
                   linetype = "dashed", colour = "red", linewidth = 0.6) +
        annotate("text", x = 2022.75, y = Inf,
                 vjust = 1.5, hjust = -0.1, size = 2, colour = "black",
                 label = "Ann.") +
        annotate("text", x = 2023.5, y = Inf,
                 vjust = 1.5, hjust = -0.1, size = 2, colour = "red",
                 label = "Imp.") +
        labs(
            title = .y,
            x     = NULL,
            y     = "ULEV share"
        ) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 8))
)
```
```{r}
#| label: plot-2023-significant
#| message: false

# Plot significant and near-significant boroughs only (p <= 0.10)
sig_boroughs_2023 <- c("Barking and Dagenham", "Hillingdon", "Sutton",
                        "Harrow", "Wandsworth")

plots_2023_sig <- map2(
    synth_2023_list[sig_boroughs_2023],
    sig_boroughs_2023,
    ~ .x |>
        plot_trends() +
        geom_vline(xintercept = 2022.75,
                   linetype = "dashed", colour = "black", linewidth = 0.6) +
        geom_vline(xintercept = 2023.5,
                   linetype = "dashed", colour = "red", linewidth = 0.6) +
        annotate("text", x = 2022.75, y = Inf,
                 vjust = 1.5, hjust = -0.1, size = 2.5, colour = "black",
                 label = "Ann.") +
        annotate("text", x = 2023.5, y = Inf,
                 vjust = 1.5, hjust = -0.1, size = 2.5, colour = "red",
                 label = "Imp.") +
        labs(
            title = .y,
            x     = NULL,
            y     = "ULEV share"
        ) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 9))
)

wrap_plots(plots_2023_sig, ncol = 3)

#| label: plot-2023-trends-1
#| message: false

# First 10 boroughs — trends
wrap_plots(plots_2023_all[1:10], ncol = 2)
#| label: plot-2023-trends-2
#| message: false

# Remaining 9 boroughs — trends
wrap_plots(plots_2023_all[11:19], ncol = 2)
```

```{r}
#| label: plot-2023-placebos
#| message: false

plots_2023_placebo <- map2(
    synth_2023_list,
    names(synth_2023_list),
    ~ .x |>
        plot_placebos() +
        geom_vline(xintercept = 2022.75,
                   linetype = "dashed", colour = "black", linewidth = 0.6) +
        geom_vline(xintercept = 2023.5,
                   linetype = "dashed", colour = "red", linewidth = 0.6) +
        labs(
            title = .y,
            x     = NULL,
            y     = "Gap in ULEV share"
        ) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 8))
)

wrap_plots(plots_2023_placebo, ncol = 4)
```

```{r}
#| label: heterogeneity-2023
#| message: false

# Extract post-announcement gap for each borough
extract_gap <- function(synth_obj, borough) {
    synth_obj |>
        grab_synthetic_control() |>
        filter(time_unit > 2022.75) |>
        mutate(gap = real_y - synth_y) |>
        summarise(
            mean_gap  = mean(gap),
            max_gap   = max(gap),
            final_gap = last(gap)
        ) |>
        mutate(la_name = borough)
}

gaps_2023 <- map_dfr(
    names(synth_2023_list),
    ~ extract_gap(synth_2023_list[[.x]], .x)
)

# Merge with socio-demographic controls
# Use pre-announcement snapshot (2022 Q3)
controls_2023 <- analysis_panel |>
    st_drop_geometry() |>
    filter(yq == as.yearqtr("2022 Q3"),
           london == 1, treated == 1) |>
    select(la_name, pct_no_car, deprivation_index,
           pop_density_per_km2, house_price, median_earnings_gbp,
           avg_cars_hh)

hetero_2023 <- gaps_2023 |>
    left_join(controls_2023, by = "la_name")

glimpse(hetero_2023)
```

```{r}
#| label: hetero-plots-2023
#| message: false

# Create scatter plots of gap vs each characteristic
p_income <- ggplot(hetero_2023, aes(x = median_earnings_gbp, y = mean_gap,
                                     label = la_name)) +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    geom_text(size = 2.5, vjust = -0.8) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey50") +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, colour = "steelblue") +
    labs(title = "Gap vs Median Earnings",
         x = "Median earnings (£)", y = "Mean post-announcement gap") +
    theme_minimal()

p_house <- ggplot(hetero_2023, aes(x = house_price, y = mean_gap,
                                    label = la_name)) +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    geom_text(size = 2.5, vjust = -0.8) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey50") +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, colour = "steelblue") +
    labs(title = "Gap vs House Price",
         x = "Average house price (£)", y = "Mean post-announcement gap") +
    theme_minimal()

p_nocar <- ggplot(hetero_2023, aes(x = pct_no_car, y = mean_gap,
                                    label = la_name)) +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    geom_text(size = 2.5, vjust = -0.8) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey50") +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, colour = "steelblue") +
    labs(title = "Gap vs % No Car",
         x = "% households with no car", y = "Mean post-announcement gap") +
    theme_minimal()

p_density <- ggplot(hetero_2023, aes(x = pop_density_per_km2, y = mean_gap,
                                      label = la_name)) +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    geom_text(size = 2.5, vjust = -0.8) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey50") +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, colour = "steelblue") +
    labs(title = "Gap vs Population Density",
         x = "Population density (per km²)", y = "Mean post-announcement gap") +
    theme_minimal()

(p_income + p_house) / (p_nocar + p_density)
```

```{r}
#| label: hetero-plots-no-wandsworth
#| message: false

hetero_no_wand <- hetero_2023 |> filter(la_name != "Wandsworth")

p_income2 <- ggplot(hetero_no_wand, aes(x = median_earnings_gbp, y = mean_gap,
                                          label = la_name)) +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    geom_text(size = 2.5, vjust = -0.8) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey50") +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, colour = "steelblue") +
    labs(title = "Gap vs Median Earnings (excl. Wandsworth)",
         x = "Median earnings (£)", y = "Mean post-announcement gap") +
    theme_minimal()

p_house2 <- ggplot(hetero_no_wand, aes(x = house_price, y = mean_gap,
                                         label = la_name)) +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    geom_text(size = 2.5, vjust = -0.8) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey50") +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, colour = "steelblue") +
    labs(title = "Gap vs House Price (excl. Wandsworth)",
         x = "Average house price (£)", y = "Mean post-announcement gap") +
    theme_minimal()

p_nocar2 <- ggplot(hetero_no_wand, aes(x = pct_no_car, y = mean_gap,
                                         label = la_name)) +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    geom_text(size = 2.5, vjust = -0.8) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey50") +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, colour = "steelblue") +
    labs(title = "Gap vs % No Car (excl. Wandsworth)",
         x = "% households with no car", y = "Mean post-announcement gap") +
    theme_minimal()

p_density2 <- ggplot(hetero_no_wand, aes(x = pop_density_per_km2, y = mean_gap,
                                           label = la_name)) +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    geom_text(size = 2.5, vjust = -0.8) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey50") +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, colour = "steelblue") +
    labs(title = "Gap vs Population Density (excl. Wandsworth)",
         x = "Population density (per km²)", y = "Mean post-announcement gap") +
    theme_minimal()

(p_income2 + p_house2) / (p_nocar2 + p_density2)
```

```{r}
#| label: synth-2023-disagg
#| message: false

# Flexible synthetic control function for any outcome
run_synth_2023_outcome <- function(borough, outcome_var) {
    data_filtered <- panel_2023 |>
        filter(la_name %in% donor_2023 | la_name == borough)
    
    tryCatch(
        data_filtered |>
            synthetic_control(
                outcome           = !!sym(outcome_var),
                unit              = la_name,
                time              = time_num,
                i_unit            = borough,
                i_time            = 2022.75,
                generate_placebos = TRUE
            ) |>
            generate_predictor(
                time_window   = 2019.0:2022.75,
                mean_pre      = mean(!!sym(outcome_var))
            ) |>
            generate_predictor(
                time_window = 2022.0,
                pre_level   = !!sym(outcome_var)
            ) |>
            generate_weights(optimization_window = 2019.0:2022.75) |>
            generate_control(),
        error = function(e) {
            message("Failed for ", borough, ": ", conditionMessage(e))
            NULL
        }
    )
}

# Run for company share
synth_2023_company <- map(treated_2023, 
                          ~ run_synth_2023_outcome(.x, "company_share"))
names(synth_2023_company) <- treated_2023

# Run for private share
synth_2023_private <- map(treated_2023,
                          ~ run_synth_2023_outcome(.x, "private_share"))
names(synth_2023_private) <- treated_2023

message("Company: ", sum(map_chr(synth_2023_company, ~ if (is.null(.x)) "FAILED" else "OK") == "OK"), " succeeded")
message("Private: ", sum(map_chr(synth_2023_private, 
        ~ if (is.null(.x)) "FAILED" else "OK") == "OK"), " succeeded")
```

```{r}
#| label: sig-2023-disagg
#| message: false

sig_2023_company <- map_dfr(
    names(synth_2023_company),
    ~ synth_2023_company[[.x]] |>
        grab_significance() |>
        filter(unit_name == .x) |>
        mutate(borough = .x)
)

sig_2023_private <- map_dfr(
    names(synth_2023_private),
    ~ synth_2023_private[[.x]] |>
        grab_significance() |>
        filter(unit_name == .x) |>
        mutate(borough = .x)
)

sig_2023_company |>
    select(borough, rank, fishers_exact_pvalue) |>
    rename(rank_company = rank, pval_company = fishers_exact_pvalue) |>
    left_join(
        sig_2023_private |>
            select(borough, rank, fishers_exact_pvalue) |>
            rename(rank_private = rank, pval_private = fishers_exact_pvalue),
        by = "borough"
    ) |>
    arrange(rank_company) |>
    kable(
        digits    = 3,
        caption   = "Synthetic Control Results by Keepership — 2023 ULEZ Expansion",
        col.names = c("Borough", "Rank (Company)", "p-value (Company)",
                      "Rank (Private)", "p-value (Private)")
    ) |>
    kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"))
```

```{r}
# Run for BEV share
synth_2023_bev <- map(treated_2023,
                      ~ run_synth_2023_outcome(.x, "bev_share"))
names(synth_2023_bev) <- treated_2023

# Run for PHEV share
synth_2023_phev <- map(treated_2023,
                       ~ run_synth_2023_outcome(.x, "phev_share"))
names(synth_2023_phev) <- treated_2023

message("BEV: ", sum(map_chr(synth_2023_bev,
        ~ if (is.null(.x)) "FAILED" else "OK") == "OK"), " succeeded")
message("PHEV: ", sum(map_chr(synth_2023_phev,
        ~ if (is.null(.x)) "FAILED" else "OK") == "OK"), " succeeded")
```

```{r}
#| label: sig-2023-fuel
#| message: false

# BEV share significance
sig_2023_bev <- map_dfr(
    names(synth_2023_bev),
    ~ synth_2023_bev[[.x]] |>
        grab_significance() |>
        filter(unit_name == .x) |>
        mutate(borough = .x)
)

# PHEV share significance
sig_2023_phev <- map_dfr(
    names(synth_2023_phev),
    ~ synth_2023_phev[[.x]] |>
        grab_significance() |>
        filter(unit_name == .x) |>
        mutate(borough = .x)
)

# Combined table
sig_2023_bev |>
    select(borough, rank, fishers_exact_pvalue) |>
    rename(rank_bev = rank, pval_bev = fishers_exact_pvalue) |>
    left_join(
        sig_2023_phev |>
            select(borough, rank, fishers_exact_pvalue) |>
            rename(rank_phev = rank, pval_phev = fishers_exact_pvalue),
        by = "borough"
    ) |>
    arrange(rank_bev) |>
    kable(
        digits    = 3,
        caption   = "Synthetic Control Results by Fuel Type — 2023 ULEZ Expansion",
        col.names = c("Borough", "Rank (BEV)", "p-value (BEV)",
                      "Rank (PHEV)", "p-value (PHEV)")
    )
```

```{r}
#| label: results-summary-table
#| message: false

# Function to extract summary stats for each borough
extract_summary <- function(synth_obj, borough, announce_time, implement_time) {
    
    sc_data <- synth_obj |> grab_synthetic_control()
    
    # Pre-period fit
    pre_mspe <- sc_data |>
        filter(time_unit <= announce_time) |>
        mutate(sq_error = (real_y - synth_y)^2) |>
        summarise(mspe = mean(sq_error)) |>
        pull(mspe)
    
    # Anticipation window gap (announcement to implementation)
    anticipation_gap <- sc_data |>
        filter(time_unit > announce_time, 
               time_unit < implement_time) |>
        mutate(gap = real_y - synth_y) |>
        summarise(mean_gap = mean(gap)) |>
        pull(mean_gap)
    
    # Post-announcement mean gap
    post_gap <- sc_data |>
        filter(time_unit > announce_time) |>
        mutate(gap = real_y - synth_y) |>
        summarise(mean_gap = mean(gap)) |>
        pull(mean_gap)
    
    tibble(
        borough          = borough,
        pre_mspe         = pre_mspe,
        anticipation_gap = anticipation_gap,
        post_gap         = post_gap
    )
}

# 2019 expansion
summary_2019 <- map_dfr(
    names(synth_2019_list),
    ~ extract_summary(synth_2019_list[[.x]], .x,
                      announce_time  = 2017.0,
                      implement_time = 2019.25)
) |>
    left_join(sig_2019 |> select(borough, rank, fishers_exact_pvalue),
              by = "borough") |>
    mutate(expansion = "2019")

# 2021 expansion
summary_2021 <- map_dfr(
    names(synth_2021_list),
    ~ extract_summary(synth_2021_list[[.x]], .x,
                      announce_time  = 2019.25,
                      implement_time = 2021.75)
) |>
    left_join(sig_2021 |> select(borough, rank, fishers_exact_pvalue),
              by = "borough") |>
    mutate(expansion = "2021")

# 2023 expansion
summary_2023 <- map_dfr(
    names(synth_2023_list),
    ~ extract_summary(synth_2023_list[[.x]], .x,
                      announce_time  = 2022.75,
                      implement_time = 2023.5)
) |>
    left_join(sig_2023 |> select(borough, rank, fishers_exact_pvalue),
              by = "borough") |>
    mutate(expansion = "2023")

# Combine all three
results_table <- bind_rows(summary_2019, summary_2021, summary_2023) |>
    mutate(
        direction = case_when(
            anticipation_gap > 0 ~ "Positive",
            anticipation_gap < 0 ~ "Negative",
            TRUE                 ~ "Neutral"
        ),
        significant = case_when(
            fishers_exact_pvalue <= 0.05 ~ "**",
            fishers_exact_pvalue <= 0.10 ~ "*",
            TRUE                         ~ ""
        )
    ) |>
    select(expansion, borough, pre_mspe, anticipation_gap, 
           post_gap, rank, fishers_exact_pvalue, significant, direction) |>
    arrange(expansion, rank)

results_table |>
    kable(
        digits    = 4,
        caption   = "Synthetic Control Results — All Three ULEZ Expansions",
        col.names = c("Expansion", "Borough", "Pre-MSPE", 
                      "Anticipation Gap", "Post-Ann. Gap",
                      "Rank", "p-value", "", "Direction")
    )
```
